description_long: This is a rectangular yellow traffic sign mounted on a vertical metallic post. The sign face displays the words 'SPEED BUMP AHEAD' in bold black uppercase letters, clearly intended to warn drivers of an upcoming speed bump. The sign panel is bordered and has a smooth, slightly reflective surface, while the rear side shows some rust stains, indicating exposure to outdoor elements. The post is cylindrical, metallic, and appears sturdy, designed to be embedded into the ground for stability. The sign is of a standard size commonly seen in urban and suburban environments, ensuring visibility to both drivers and pedestrians. There are no symbols or pictograms, only text, and the mounting is typical for roadside warning signs.
description: A yellow rectangular 'SPEED BUMP AHEAD' warning sign on a metallic post, with visible rust on the back and bold black text on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow sign face with 'SPEED BUMP AHEAD' text in black.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical post.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing rust stains on the back of the sign and the attachment to the post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and metallic post.
